titleStmt.title: SII 28.3: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 3. (A.R. No. 3 of 1913.) ARUMBĀVŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: The text is full of spelling mistakes. It records the grant of land as bhū-dāna-iṟai-ili (tax free grant of land) to God Vaḍa-Kayilāyam-uḍaiya-Nāyanār of Arumbār for the bath with ghee of the God on the occasion of Vishu-ayana-saṅkaramas, ashṭamis and eclipses as also for connected worship, by Malaiyan Vāṇarāyan. Refers to the land of Tavarāja-bhaṭṭar while defining the land granted to the God. (See below No. 4).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Irācarāca tevaṟku
yāṇṭu patināṟāCan also be Read as [nkā]vatu Āvaṇi mātam Arumpār vaṭakayi
lāyamuṭaiya nāyaWritten below the line.nāṟku Arumpār vaṭaparappil pūtāna Iṟaiyiliyāka
māñcekku vaṭakkum meṟkum puñcey nilam munṟu veliyu
m tavarāca paṭṭā nilattukku kiḻakku nācciyārkku Iṭṭa nilam
Āyiramum teṇṭapāṇiThe medial it is written across the stem. There are mistakes in spelling.tevar pakkal kācu Iṭṭu koṇṭu vi
ṭṭa puncey ṉilam mām parappil nilam Iraṇṭāyiram kira
ṅkarai nilam Eḻunūṟu Itil tavarācapaṭṭaṟkut teṇṭapāṇi te
var tanma tānam kuṭutta teṟkaṭaiya nilam kuḻinūṟu ṉikki kuḻi Aṟu
nūṟum karaippuncey kuḻi Irunūṟṟu muppatum nancey kuḻi nū
ṟṟu Aimpatu Innancey kuḻi nūṟṟu Aimpatuṅ koṇṭu viṣu
Ayanacaṅkaramaṅkaḷukkum Aṭṭamikaḷukkum kirakaṇaṅkaḷukkum
Ivai Oru tivakaṅkaḷukkuRead tikaḷukku or tivacattukkuAracanāl nāḻi ney Āṭiyaruḷap paṇ
ṇavum nikki ninṟa nilaṅkaḷa koṇṭu pūcai celutta kaṭava
tāka kalveṭṭik kuṭutten malaiyan vāṇavarāyaneṉ Inni
lam (m) kuṭutta 3 kolāle kuṭutta 3 Itu
Digital edition of SII 28.3 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
